name: Saudara AI
long_description:
Indonesian exports to the US grew 23% in 2025 up to over $30B. The shift is happening. Most brands just don't have the on-ramp yet.

Saudara AI is an AI-native sourcing agency connecting American brands with Indonesian suppliers across apparel, textiles, home goods, supplements, and raw materials. Our AI agent finds your factory, handles vetting, sampling, and delivery. A human is in the loop at every stage.

No more ghosting. No more waiting months for supplier updates. You always know where your order stands.

We are the on-ramp.
